nature: pre-outcome conformance only; zero official rows existed; no task content, scientific setting, threshold, family, band, cap rule, verifier, or gate changed

corrections.ledger_separation: --smoke writes to a distinct private smoke ledger and an m38e_driver_smoke aggregate artifact; the official run refuses smoke markers, foreign run ids, foreign manifest digests, or any row not proven to belong to the exact official run
corrections.provenance_bound_rows: run identity derived before engine construction (clean tracked tree, full git commit, sha256 of driver/generators/manifest/capture/worker-override/verifier sources, pinned checkpoint+revision, override hash, ordered 288-task-set digest over id/family/band/prompt-hash/answer-hash); every private row carries the full identity; resume requires exact equality on all fields, rejects unknown/duplicate/tampered/cap-mismatched/malformed rows, and completion is exact set equality; --model-ref must repeat the frozen model pointer
corrections.cap_escalation: frozen 2048->4096 rule implemented: full 24-task band at 2048; if exact truncation > 0.10, the SHA256(m38e-4096-pilot-v1:id)-ordered first eight truncated tasks rerun at 4096 as cap-choice evidence only; material reduction (>= half resolved AND >= 2 resolved) triggers a complete 4096 band rerun whose ledger alone feeds eligibility; pilot failure marks the band ineligible-by-escalation; caps never mix in a primary estimate
corrections.exact_eligibility: Fraction arithmetic, rounding only in displayed fields; the [0.20, 0.80] gate applies inclusively to raw_verified_pass_rate = completed_correct/n (completed-only rate reported, not gated); completion/truncation gates use the final single-cap ledger; the overall >= 48 completed-incorrect count comes from eligible bands only; frontier-not-found is legal only after every 2048 band and every triggered pilot/full-band path completes
corrections.tool_arm_integrity: later sealed policy/repair phases must construct real deterministic tool answers and pass them through the same frozen family verifier (machinery pattern established in the M36T evaluator; enforced before any M38E policy arm is authorized)
corrections.smoke_identity_boundary: smoke rows carry run_kind=m38e_driver_smoke and attempt_kind=smoke_2048 — content the official validator names and rejects even when every hash, commit, revision, and cap matches; official rows carry run_kind=m38e_official_dev with exact-equality resume; missing or unknown run_kind blocks before engine construction; an existing smoke ledger is exact-validated (foreign commits, stale ids, changed hashes, duplicates, wrong caps, out-of-subset rows block rather than silently skip); the smoke aggregate reports rows actually generated vs exact-validated, never bare plan length
corrections.explicit_task_provenance: every generated task, the ordered task-set digest, the run identity, and every private row carry an explicit integer task_index and generator_seed_id=m38e-dev-v1; resume requires exact equality on both; the run identity was recomputed pre-outcome (zero official rows existed)

tests: tests/test_m38e_dev_sweep.py — 23 synthetic tests including the ten steer-a9b91f7-required proofs (real smoke rows rejected by the official validator, run_kind boundary, exact smoke-ledger validation, zero smoke/official key overlap, digest/row binding of index and seed)
